subcodes.title: Words spoken in Jul. 1912 in the United States
subcodes.first_line: The Essence of Divinity--God--is sanctified above ascent, descent, and appearance. The lights of His qualities are manifest or reflected in the mirrors of the hearts of His Holy Manifestations.... It means the transference or transformation of created bodies into infinite forms of creation. Every indivisible electron is transformed into all the forms of creatures and everything travels or moves in everything.
subcodes.subjects: @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @all things are in motion; kinds of motion
